SEE BRIGGS V. NILSON (1964) 226 CAL.APP.2D 342. THE COURT NOTES THAT COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND REPLY HAVE NOT BEEN DELIVERED. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B IN THE FUTURE WILL RESULT IN THE MOTION BEING TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT LOUISE LONG'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges existence of a fiduciary relationship. Such relationship combined with other facts alleged overcomes all arguments raised on the demurrer. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Continued To Sep-01-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Continued To Jul-21-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT LOUISE LONG DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege fact is support of each element of each cause of action, including but not limited to facts to support "other factors" establishing existence of a fiduciary/confidential relationship going beyond mere relationship between parent and child and/or any other basis for legal and equitable claims. See Briggs v. Nilson (1964) 226 Cal.App.2d 342. The Court notes that courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply have not been delivered. Failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B in the future will result in the motion being taken off calendar. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
